ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-21-2025 Continued To Feb-18-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Stacy Stecher for Margaret Lewis, Administrator (via Zoom).

Ms. Stecher explained delays in filing an inventory and appraisal due to holiday interruptions and challenges working with the client to provide necessary information to the probate referee and requested a 30-day continuance to file a partial inventory and appraisal, specifically covering cash and equity portions of the estate.

The court continued the matter to February 18, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-03-2024 Continued To Jan-21-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Stacy Stecher for Margaret Lewis, Administrator.

Ms. Stecher reports that she hopes to have the inventory and appraisal completed by the first week of January and anticipates having a petition for final distribution ready shortly thereafter. She indicated that a different attorney will be filing a separate probate case for the estate of Bernice Boddie in Los Angeles County. The court continues the status on close of estate hearing to January 21, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
